revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{notice action|}}} | view | | {{#ifexist: Template:Editnotices/Namespace/{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{NAMESPACE}}|Main}} | {{#if: {{Template:Editnotices/Namespace/{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{NAMESPACE}}|Main}}}} |
{{Template:Editnotices/Namespace/{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{NAMESPACE}}|Main}}}}
}} }} }}{{editnotice load/core | notice action = {{{notice action|}}} | group allowed = {{ns has subpages}} | groupnotice = Template:Editnotices/Group/{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}} | pagenotice = {{#ifeq: {{SUBJECTSPACE}}#{{PAGENAME}} | {{ns:User}}#{{BASEPAGENAME}} | {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Editnotice | Template:Editnotices/Page/{{FULLPAGENAME}} }} | userpage = {{#ifeq: {{SUBJECTSPACE}}#{{PAGENAME}} | {{ns:User}}#{{BASEPAGENAME}} | yes }} | ownuserpage = {{#ifeq: {{SUBJECTSPACE}}#{{PAGENAME}} | {{ns:User}}#{{REVISIONUSER}} | yes }} }}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting with templates included
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{notice action|}}} | view | | {{#ifexist: Template:Editnotices/Namespace/{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{NAMESPACE}}|Main}} | {{#if: {{Template:Editnotices/Namespace/{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{NAMESPACE}}|Main}}}} |
{{Template:Editnotices/Namespace/{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{NAMESPACE}}|Main}}}}
}} }} }}{{editnotice load/core | notice action = {{{notice action|}}} | group allowed = {{ns has subpages}} | groupnotice = Template:Editnotices/Group/{{FULLROOTPAGENAME}} | pagenotice = {{#ifeq: {{SUBJECTSPACE}}#{{PAGENAME}} | {{ns:User}}#{{BASEPAGENAME}} | {{FULLPAGENAME}}/Editnotice | Template:Editnotices/Page/{{FULLPAGENAME}} }} | userpage = {{#ifeq: {{SUBJECTSPACE}}#{{PAGENAME}} | {{ns:User}}#{{BASEPAGENAME}} | yes }} | ownuserpage = {{#ifeq: {{SUBJECTSPACE}}#{{PAGENAME}} | {{ns:User}}#{{REVISIONUSER}} | yes }} }}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; add wikidata link from enwiki Template:Editnotice load/content (Q20539183) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25460205297|commit triggered pipeline]]
